title: gnutls bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[3.8.3-9]
- key_update: rework the rekeying logic (RHEL-107499)

[3.8.3-8]
- Add missing changelog entry

[3.8.3-7]
- Fix CVE-2025-32988, CVE-2025-32989, CVE-2025-32990, and CVE-2025-6395
